posts.text: 🎆US Dept of @Energy has published the 'Voluntary Agreement'📜✍️ signed by nearly 100 companies in its new #Nuclear Fuel Cycle Consortium👥🇺🇸🛢️☢️ which, using Defense Production Act tools, aims to bolster the domestic supply of #Uranium fuel for existing & future US reactors.⛽️⛏️🏭🧑‍🏭🤠🐂 https://www.govinfo.gov/content/pkg/FR-2026-07-06/pdf/2026-13486.pdf
